AboutPage.heroSubtitle: Your trusted partner for luxury travel experiences in Turkey
AboutPage.ourStoryP1: Pro Transfer Company strives to provide the best services with the highest standards, backed by experience since 2004. It is a member of the most prominent Turkish companies specializing in tourism services and the Turkish Association of Travel Agencies.
AboutPage.ourStoryP2: The company's headquarters is located in the heart of Istanbul, in the Taksim area. It collaborates with companies from all over the world and offers a wide range of tourism services, including hotel, apartment bookings, flight tickets, airport pick-up and drop-off services, as well as medical tourism, investment services, real estate, and import/export.
AboutPage.ourMissionDesc: Turkiye is one of the most beautiful and attractive tourist destinations in the world, as it is the land of breathtaking nature, ancient history, vibrant culture, sandy beaches, delicious food and distinctive tourist activities.
AboutPage.catalogRealEstateDesc: Pro Transfer Company provides the best services in the field of investment and real estate in Turkiye and provides the best options for obtaining Turkish citizenship through the sale and purchase of apartments, villas, agricultural, construction and investment lands throughout Turkey.
AboutPage.catalogTradeDesc: Turkiye is distinguished by the variety and quality of its products, making it common to import various goods from there, such as food products, textiles, furnishings, and many other items. At Pro Transfer Company, we provide you with all our services in trade and export, helping you choose the best products at the lowest prices.
AboutPage.catalogMedicalDesc: The quality of the medical services provided, along with affordable prices and successful cosmetic surgeries, has made Turkiye a leader in the field of medical tourism. We collaborate with the best hospitals equipped with the latest and most luxurious medical equipment, as well as the top doctors in Turkiye.
AboutPage.catalogRentCarDesc: We provide you with renting all types of cars in Turkiye with a driver with long experience in the tourism field who is Arabic speaking.
AboutPage.catalogHotelsDesc: Hotels in Istanbul are characterized by their charming and varied views. Also, hotel apartments are available at a high level, and we provide you with hotel reservations with multiple options and competitive prices in the most important areas in Istanbul and all of Turkiye.
AboutPage.teamMember1Bio: With over 25 years of experience in luxury travel and tourism, Seyfettin leads our team with passion and expertise in creating unforgettable journeys for our clients.
AboutPage.teamMember2Bio: With over 25 years of experience in travel booking and customer service, Mehmet is our reservation manager. He speaks fluent English, Turkish, and Arabic, ensuring smooth communication with our international clients for all their reservation needs.
AboutPage.achievement1Desc: Official IATA certification for international travel services
AboutPage.achievement2Desc: Serving travelers from around the world with exceptional experiences
AboutPage.achievement3Desc: Consistently rated 5 stars by our satisfied clients
AboutPage.achievement4Desc: Covering all major tourist destinations in Turkey
